notes: Spec asserts: (1) Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch and (2) PID bound within 1s. Both phases anchor to recording start (agent launch) and budget 1000ms. Codex eagerly creates the rollout transcript at ~/.codex/sessions/<YYYY>/<MM>/<DD>/rollout-<ts>-<UUID>.jsonl on launch, so transcript_new + state_transition→ready land together inside the daemon's first scanner tick. The proc-<PID> pre-session row covers the brief gap (~30ms) between process spawn and the rollout file appearing.

text: Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch
